elements.content: This page was defined as 420 × 620 pt in portrait and then rotated — yielding resolved dimensions of 620 × 420 pt. Custom page sizes are common in print-on-demand workflows: receipts, shelf-edge labels, trade-paperback interiors, and booklet signatures each require a specific point dimension rather than a named standard.
Expected resolved page: 620 pt wide × 420 pt tall. Margins are 36 pt left/right and 40 pt top/bottom, giving a content area of 548 × 340 pt.

Line wrapping reflects the wider column. Compare this paragraph's break positions against the same text set on a standard portrait A5 page — nearly every line breaks later here because the resolved width is broader than either A5 dimension.
